label: My Bets
description: KPI strip with open and settled bet tables using DataTableWidget. Includes accumulator tracking.

0.5.note: No mock imports — allBets sourced from context.

0.6.note: Loading guard via Spinner on wsStatus=connecting. Hooks moved before early returns.

0.7.note: Empty handled by DataTableWidget emptyMessage + accas.length===0 guard.

0.8.note: Error guard via destructive msg on wsStatus=error|disconnected.

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass. 0.6/0.8 were added in prior pass.

1.1.note: Data via useSportsData() — no inline fetch.

1.3.note: hasSportsDesk memo reads organizationIds; adjustedBets returns [] when org has no sports desk.

1.4.note: Client cascade uses CLIENTS filtered by orgId — sports desk check only (acceptable for sports domain).

1.7.note: MOCK_BETS in context; acceptable until real API.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab and f9f29ea. Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live ✓ (active bets with real stakes), paper ✓ (stake=0 via isPaper), batch ✓ (shows settled historical bets only).

3.2.note: Context reads useExecutionMode() → isPaper zeros stakes; isBatch limits fixtures to completed.

3.5.note: Paper mode: bets display with stake=0 via adjustedBets memo in context. KPI strip shows zeroed totals.

3.6.note: No interval or WebSocket in widget — wsStatus from context used for guards only.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 pass. Human checks 3.3/3.4 pending.

4.1.note: No interactive buttons — read-only bet tables + collapsible sections.

l4.notes: Agent checks pass. Human checks 4.3/4.4/4.7/4.8 pending: verify collapsible sections toggle, scroll within widget bounds.

5.1.note: Target strategies: sports-betting. Shows all bets across open/settled/accumulator categories. Primary post-execution tracking widget for the sports domain.

l5.notes: Agent check 5.1 complete. Human walkthrough pending.

l6.notes: L6 deferred — tests not yet written for sports domain.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex/rgb/hsl colors. All uses are design tokens: border-border, bg-card/40, text-foreground, text-muted-foreground, text-destructive, border-primary/30.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: metrics useMemo deps are stable (allBets from context). No inline object/array literals in deps.

l7.notes: 7.5 globally deferred. text-[10px]/text-[11px]/text-[9px] fixed in L8.1 via text-micro/text-caption/text-nano tokens.

8.1.note: FIXED: text-micro (10px) at line 100, text-caption (11px existing token) at line 128, text-nano (9px) at line 136. Arbitrary text-[Npx] values removed.

8.3.note: Uses KpiStrip, DataTableWidget, CollapsibleSection, WidgetScroll, Spinner shared primitives — correct adoption.

8.4.note: Agent: no img without alt, no interactive div without role. CollapsibleSection handles keyboard. Human: full keyboard walk pending.

8.5.note: Human-only: resize test at minW=4/minH=3 pending.

l8.notes: 8.1 fixed — text-micro/text-caption/text-nano applied. 8.2-8.3 pass. 8.4-8.5 human pending.

keepSeparate.rationale: Pure bet tracking widget — no cross-widget coupling needed.

relationships.notes: Consumes allBets/openBets/settledBets from SportsDataContext. hasSportsDesk org filter applied in context.

dataContract.notes: Open bets may update in near-realtime as odds change. REST for initial load; WebSocket for bet status updates in production.

gaps: Accumulator leg detail not shown in mock data

findings.description: sports-my-bets-widget.tsx — loading/error guards were missing; hooks called after early return (Rules of Hooks violation)
findings.fix: wsStatus-based Spinner and error message added; hooks moved before early returns

findings.description: sports-my-bets-widget.tsx:100,128,136 — text-[10px], text-[11px], text-[9px] for compact bet row typography
findings.fix: Replaced arbitrary values with semantic tokens: text-micro (10px) for 'Open singles' label (line 100), text-caption (existing 11px token, --text-caption=0.6875rem) for accumulator rows (line 128), text-nano (9px) for status chip (line 136).
Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21
